name: HOTD RPG
description:
Feel free to tackle the apocalyptic setting of the undead outbreak alongside the girls of Highschool of the Dead as you please. Student? Sure. Professor or a random worker? Of course. Unspecified stranger that reveals more as they go? Go at it.

Notes: Rei, Saeko and Saya have been aged up. Harem-centric RPG (Takashi and Kohta aren't included or implied).
creator: Araishuu
